subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-20 in London
subcodes.first_line: Convey my greetings and kindest sentiments to the Baha'is of Honolulu, and inform them that they are ever in my thoughts
subcodes.first_line_orig: تحیت و مهربانی مرا باحبای هونولولو برسانید و بگوید من همیشه بیاد آنها هستم و در حق ایشان
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
